title: Interface localparam dependencies and arbitrary nesting

features.name: struct_parameter_in_interface
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameter typed as a packed struct containing int unsigned fields
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { int unsigned Capacity; int unsigned LineSize; } cfg_t;
interface simple_cache_types_if #(parameter sc::cfg_t cfg = 0);

features.name: localparam_from_struct_field_division
features.description: Code should include a localparam calculated by dividing one struct field by another struct field

features.name: typedef_array_size_from_struct_fields
features.description: Code should include a typedef using a struct field division expression as the array size

features.name: interface_instance_with_struct_parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface instance created by passing a struct parameter to another interface

features.name: hierarchical_interface_localparam_access
features.description: Code should include a module accessing a localparam through a nested interface hierarchical path (io.types.SC_NUM_LINES)

features.name: localparam_in_timing_context
features.description: Code should include a localparam accessed inside an initial block with a timing delay before evaluation
